method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: High stop-profile score tempered by purpose mismatch and distance-scale gap (42 vs 152 km).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High (0.71) but zone volume disparity (5 vs 26).
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Dril_Blast), moderate age/kms similarity.

1311.llm_rationale: Strong negative stop-profile correlation and minimal zone overlap; distance scale vastly different (42 vs 277 km).

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, kms_sim high but inconsistent with operational scale.

1312.llm_rationale: High stop-profile correlation offset by large operational scale gap (42 vs 285 km mean distance) and purpose mismatch.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High (0.71) but route scale mismatch reduces real similarity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Production), kms similarity high but inconsistent with distance data.

1350.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile match and shared purpose/duty, but zone-pass volume differs sharply (5 vs 27) and distance scale diverges (42 vs 141 km mean).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-high (0.57) but volume disparity in zone passes lowers confidence.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Matching purpose/duty, kms fairly close, age less so.

1363.llm_rationale: Stop-profile moderate and distance scale similar (42 vs 57 km), but purpose mismatch and low kms similarity reduce score.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Rail), kms quite different (231k vs 55k).

1421.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile correlation, shared purpose/duty, but distance scale (42 vs 168 km) and speed differ notably.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose/duty, kms fairly similar, age moderate.

1423.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and very different operating scale (42 vs 282 km mean distance) despite high kms similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, kms_sim high but distance data contradicts similarity.

1506.llm_rationale: No stop-profile signal, mismatched purpose and duty cycle (AMBULANCE vs MEDIUM), and large speed difference (27.6 vs 42.5).

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Highest among pairs (0.19) but insufficient to offset other mismatches.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle mismatch dominate, low overall similarity.

1575.llm_rationale: Stop-profile moderate, kms nearly identical, but distance scale (42 vs 262 km) and purpose mismatch lower overall similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch but kms_sim very high (close actual kms values).

1576.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile match, shared purpose/duty, and overlapping dominant zones (2,4,7), but distance-scale mismatch (42km vs 100km mean) tempers the high statistical score.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High positive correlation (0.63) indicates similar stop timing patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low (0.05) suggesting different route shapes despite zone overlap.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose/duty, moderate age/kms similarity supports moderate-high correlation.

1578.llm_rationale: Stop-profile fairly high but huge operational scale difference (42 vs 331 km mean) and purpose mismatch significantly reduce true similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate-high (0.68) but inconsistent with distance scale.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, kms similarity high but misleading given distance data.

1667.llm_rationale: No zone-pass data for 1667 (all zero), so stop-profile signal is absent; purpose mismatch further reduces similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Zero due to missing zone activity for 1667.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, kms moderately similar but insufficient to raise correlation.

1687.llm_rationale: Weaker stop-profile correlation and limited zone overlap; distance scale fairly close but purpose mismatch persists.

1688.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation despite shared purpose; zone patterns diverge (155 multi-zone vs 1688 single zone-2 dominance).

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match offsets some negativity but overall low correlation.

1785.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and divergent dominant zones (155: 2,4,7 vs 1785: 2,3) despite shared purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match, kms moderate similarity but overall weak correlation.

1993.llm_rationale: Very high stop-profile correlation and shared dominant zones (4,7) outweigh purpose mismatch, though distance scale differs (42 vs 127 km).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Very high (0.86) suggests similar temporal stop behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Tech_services) reduces score, duty match offsets slightly.

2191.llm_rationale: Stop-profile moderate but extreme distance-scale gap (42 vs 284 km) and purpose mismatch lower confidence in similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, kms_sim high but inconsistent with distance scale.

2201.llm_rationale: High stop-profile correlation and overlapping dominant zones (2,4,7) support similarity despite purpose mismatch and moderate distance gap (42 vs 92 km).

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low (0.08) but slightly higher than peers.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Tech_services), kms differ moderately.

2518.llm_rationale: High stop-profile correlation but distance scale (42 vs 152 km) and purpose mismatch (Mobile_Eq vs Dril_Blast) reduce true alignment.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
